versions.version_description: Accurate, easy acoustic strum version. Needs a capo on the second fret to match recording.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Intro: [ch]Bm[/ch]-[ch]A/B[/ch] (x3) [ch]Bm[/ch]-[ch]F#m7[/ch]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]               [ch]DM7[/ch]
Look at us baby up all night[/tab]
[tab][ch]GM7[/ch]
Tearing our love apart[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]DM7[/ch]
Aren't we the same two people who live[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F#7[/ch]
through years in the dark?[/tab]
Ahh...

Refrain 1:
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]
Every time I try to walk away[/tab]
[tab][ch]GM7[/ch]                     [ch]F#7[/ch]
Something makes me turn around and stay[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch] pause   [ch]GM7[/ch]-[ch]F#m7[/ch]
And I can't tell you why.[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
When we get crazy[/tab]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]
it just ain't too right[/tab]
[tab][ch]GM7[/ch]
(try to keep you head little girl) [/tab]
Girl I get lonely too
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
You don't have to worry[/tab]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]
Just hold on tight[/tab]
[tab][ch]GM7[/ch]
(don't get caught in your little world)[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F#7[/ch]
'Cause I love you[/tab]

Refrain 2:
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]
Nothing's wrong as far as I can see[/tab]
[tab][ch]GM7[/ch]               [ch]F#7sus4[/ch]
We make it harder than it has to be[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
and I can't tell you why no, baby,[/tab]
[tab][ch]GM7[/ch]              [ch]F#m7[/ch]-[ch]F#7[/ch]
I can't tell you why[/tab]
[tab][ch]GM7[/ch]              [ch]F#m7[/ch] pause
I can't tell you why[/tab]

Ad lib:
[ch]Bm[/ch]-[ch]A[/ch] (x2)

[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]         [ch]GM7[/ch]
Ooh...hoo[/tab]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]-[ch]GM7[/ch]-[ch]F#m7[/ch]-[ch]F#7[/ch]
Ooh...hoo[/tab]

[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]
No, no, baby, [/tab]
[tab][ch]GM7[/ch]              [ch]F#7sus4[/ch]-[ch]F#7[/ch]
I can't tell you why[/tab]
[tab][ch]GM7[/ch]              [ch]F#m7[/ch]
I can't tell you why[/tab]
[tab][ch]GM7[/ch]              [ch]F#m7[/ch]
I can't tell you why[/tab]

Ad Lib:
[ch]GM7[/ch]-[ch]F#m7[/ch] until fade
